name_en: M80399 Light Blue Embossed M47173 This model Multi Pochette Accessoires handbag is crafted from Monogram Empreinte leather with microfiber lining. The large clutch in the two-in-one design features an interior pocket, a detachable chain, and a shoulder strap for versatile carrying. Detailed features 25 x 14.5 x 4.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
